description: Tacit USD (tacUSD): a confidential, Bitcoin-backed dollar on Tacit. cUSD is minted against self-custodial cBTC collateral through an over-collateralized CDP priced by Chainlink BTC/USD; tacUSD is its public ERC-20 form. Unwrap a shielded cUSD note to mint tacUSD; wrap tacUSD to shield it back into the confidential pool.
name: Tacit USD
